rulings.Case Title: BILL MOOMEY VS. CHASE BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2012 Line 1 - DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend no opposition filed, prevailing party to submit order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENIA LOPEZ et al VS. U.S. BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2012 Line 7 - Defendants U.S. Bank N.A., Bank of America, N.A. and Recontrust Company, N.A.'s Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Second Amended Complaint. Continue to July 24, 2012, moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C by July 13, 2012 4:00pm. =(501/ERQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROSE OKELLO VS. INDYMAC MBS, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2012 Line 4 - DEFENDANT IMPAC FUNDING CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain, with leave to amend as fraud in inducement, cancellation of instrument breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing and as to promissory estoppel to allege only as to other defendants. Sustain, without leave to amend as to wrongful foreclosure and UCL violation. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROSE OKELLO VS. INDYMAC MBS, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2012 Line 4 - DEFENDANT IMPAC FUNDING CORPORATION's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Grant, no opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT HEINICKE VS. DENNIS VINCENT MCGUIRE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2012 Line 5 - DEFENDANT DENNIS MCGUIRE's Motion To Dismiss. Sustain, without leave to amend fails to establish landlord tenant relationship and judicial notice document show plaintiff not owner. =(501/EQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN TOM et al VS. SHERRY VINSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2012 Line 6 - DEFENDANT SHERRY VINSON and QIANA MARTIN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, triable in fact as to end of term of Martin's tenancy per oral agreement and Vinson's status as authorized subtenant at Apartment 1. =(501/ERQ)

rulings.Case Title: TBJ INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. SANJEEV KUMAR RAJ
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 28, 2012 Line 9 - PLAINTIFF TBJ INVESTMENTS, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, plaintiff fails to establish that defendants are in possession. (see surrender of possession filed 6-1-2012) =(501/REQ)
